ddls:
CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm (e.g., RHC, SA) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the algorithm was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the algorithm's details */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the algorithm (e.g., optimization, classification) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the algorithm */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the algorithm is currently active and available for use */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm evaluated */,
  "iteration" INTEGER /* Number of iterations used in the experiment */,
  "number_of_points" INTEGER /* Number of points evaluated during the experiment */,
  "evaluation" REAL /* Evaluation score of the algorithm */,
  "training_time" REAL /* Training time taken for the experiment (in seconds) */,
  "experiment_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was conducted */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who conducted the experiment */,
  "data_set_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training data set used */,
  "preprocessing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the preprocessing steps applied */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* JSON object storing the parameters used for the experiment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Text field for any additional notes or comments about the experiment */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the experiment results are public or private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_preprocessing_id FOREIGN KEY ("preprocessing_id") REFERENCES data_preprocessing_steps ("preprocessing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_data_set_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_set_id") REFERENCES training_data_sets ("data_set_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of the experiment */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment this version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the experiment */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the version was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if this is the current version of the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_versions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_versions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the user account */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number for contact purposes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_experiments" (
  "user_experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user-experiment relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who conducted the experiment */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment conducted */,
  "date_assigned" TEXT /* Date when the user was assigned to the experiment */,
  "role_in_experiment" TEXT /* Role of the user in the experiment (e.g., lead, collaborator) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object storing the user's permissions for the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_experiments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_experiments_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the metric */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment to which the metric relates */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., Accuracy, Precision) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the metric was recorded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recorded the metric */,
  "is_validated" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the metric has been validated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_metrics_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_metrics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment related to this log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken (e.g., created, updated) */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was logged */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details or context about the action taken */,
  "is_important" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the log entry is important and should be highlighted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_data_sets" (
  "data_set_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the data set */,
  "data_set_name" TEXT /* Name of the training data set */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data set */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data set (e.g., open data repository) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the data set was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the data set */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the data set in bytes */,
  "license" TEXT /* License information for the data set */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the data set is public or private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_set_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_preprocessing_steps" (
  "preprocessing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preprocessing step */,
  "data_set_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset to which this step applies */,
  "step_description" TEXT /* Description of the preprocessing step */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for the preprocessing step */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the preprocessing step was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the preprocessing step */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if this is the default preprocessing step for the data set */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preprocessing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_preprocessing_steps_data_set_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_set_id") REFERENCES training_data_sets ("data_set_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the result record */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment to which the result pertains */,
  "final_evaluation" REAL /* Final evaluation score of the experiment */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date when the result was recorded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the result was recorded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recorded the result */,
  "is_validated" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the result has been validated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Text field for any additional notes or comments about the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_results_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_results_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
